subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! Upon thee be My Glory! Hearken unto My call from the precincts of My prison, for verily it draweth thee nigh unto the court of My majesty and the sanctuary of My holiness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی علیک بهائی اسمعی ندائی من شطر سجنی انه یقربک الی ساحه عزی و بساط قدسی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for women, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
